name: josstei/maestro-orchestrate
summary: Multi-runtime orchestration framework for Codex, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Qwen Code with Codex-native `$maestro` skills, staged Design/Plan/Execute workflows, persistent session state, specialist delegation, approval gates, and review-driven completion rules.
evidence: Provides a generated Codex runtime under `plugins/maestro/` with `.codex-plugin` metadata, `$maestro:*` skills, MCP configuration, and runtime documentation.

Defines Express and Standard workflows rather than leaving users to invent the success model; Standard runs Design, Plan, Execute, and Complete phases with approval gates and persistent session output.
Validation methodology stops on blocking failures, and final review blocks completion when unresolved Critical or Major findings remain.
